description_long: This is a small, cartoonish airplane with a brown fuselage and green wings, propeller, and tail surfaces. The airplane features exaggerated, rounded shapes and large, expressive eyes on the front, giving it a playful, character-like appearance. The wings are straight and mounted low on the fuselage, with no visible winglets or dihedral angle. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, all fixed and exposed. The cockpit is forward-mounted and appears to be a single-seat, with a simple white windshield. The overall design is simplified and stylized, suitable for a whimsical or child-friendly urban environment.
description: A small, cartoon-style brown and green airplane with a propeller nose, large eyes, and low-mounted straight wings. It has fixed landing gear and a forward single-seat cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the airplane's large eyes, green propeller, and the full span of the green wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the brown fuselage, green wing, and the fixed main and tail wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tail structure, both main wheels, and the straight alignment of the wings.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the green wing, brown fuselage, and the propeller at the nose.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and one tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, single-seat cockpit with a simple, enclosed canopy and white windshield.
